objective: Create a reusable accepted daily-only adapter that applies the V3.45.1 quarantine list at read time and preserves V3.44 raw-data capability blocks.
forbidden: Do not edit raw CSV source files.
Do not create adjusted returns from unadjusted prices.
Do not allow portfolio performance backtests through this adapter.
acceptance: Quarantined rows must be excluded by default.
Normal dates must load without row loss.
Unsupported adjusted-return and valuation capabilities must raise DataCapabilityError.
The adapter must expose raw data only as accepted_processed_daily_only with price_adjustment none_raw.
The final report must state that no model promotion occurred.
